hero.subhead: Find, choose and enrol in your driving school in minutes. All online, no queues.
hero.mascotNote:
For all license types,
not just category B 😊
hero.trust: Trusted by 12,000+ students across 14 regions. Secure payments via PayPal, Apple Pay and Google Pay.

howItWorks.heading: Three moves. Then you're on the road.

1.title: Find your school
1.description: Explore the map, filter by region, choose your school and you're all set

2.title: Enrol online
2.description: Fill in, pay, and get driving in less than 2 months!

3.title: Study and book
3.description: Quizzes on your phone, book lessons whenever you want.

whyDigital.heading: Why wait a year to drive? Get your pink slip in 2 months, not 12.

1.title: Do everything online
1.body: Complete online enrollment: everything is digital, the only sheet you'll need is your learner's permit!
1.imageAlt: young person scanning document with phone

3.title: Official Quizzes
3.body: Official Ministry quizzes, in your browser or app, with analytics on your weak topics. Practise in the 5 minutes between classes.
3.imageAlt: student studying on phone in cafe

4.title: Deadlines you can't forget.
4.body: Pink sheet, exams, licence renewal dates — one timeline that pings you via email and WhatsApp.

b2b.heading: Bring your driving school into the future.
b2b.body: Manage enrolments, payments, quizzes and lesson bookings from a single dashboard. With our app, you take care of your business and your students whenever and wherever you want. Join us! Register your school and contact us to activate your free trial.

1.q: How much does it cost to enrol via Patentedigitale.it?
1.a: Enrolment is free. You pay only the price of the school you choose, which is discounted compared to what you'd pay walking in.

2.q: What documents do I need to start?
2.a: ID, codice fiscale, medical certificate (uploaded after the visit), one digital ID photo. We ask one at a time, not all at once.

4.a: Yes. Your data is GDPR-compliant, stored on European servers, encrypted at rest and in transit. Payments go through PCI-DSS certified providers (PayPal, Stripe).

1.quote: I did the whole thing from bed, in pyjamas, in half an hour. My mum couldn't believe it.
1.name: Sofia, 18 — Milan

2.quote: I paid, but he did everything. First time I didn't have to go to the school office.
2.name: Cristina, 47 — Bologna

3.quote: I switched my Romanian licence to an Italian one without speaking Italian once. The English support saved me.
3.name: Andrei, 29 — Roma

finalCta.heading: Ready to drive?
finalCta.subhead: Find your driving school in 30 seconds. No account, no email, no commitment.

footer.brandDescription: The platform digitalising Italian driving schools. Students, schools, admin — all online.
